title: keraselma oleraceum
intro: Keraselma oleraceum, also known as the False Morel, is a type of edible wild mushroom that belongs to the family Pezizaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal effects, which can aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Keraselma oleraceum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Keraselma oleraceum can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be carefully regulated due to the risk of poisoning from incorrect identification.
